templates.title: Line trend
templates.task: Show one trend over time.
templates.risk: Can hide seasonal or subgroup patterns.

templates.title: Multi-line comparison
templates.task: Compare several series on one axis.
templates.risk: Too many lines become unreadable.

templates.title: Scatter relationship
templates.task: Show relation between two numeric variables.
templates.risk: Correlation does not prove causality.

templates.title: Regression scatter
templates.task: Show x-y relation with a fitted trend.
templates.risk: A straight fit can hide nonlinear structure.

templates.title: Confidence band
templates.task: Show mean and uncertainty.
templates.risk: Band meaning must be defined.

templates.title: Grouped bar
templates.task: Compare categories across groups.
templates.risk: Bars hide within-group variation.

templates.title: Heatmap matrix
templates.task: Show matrix or grid values.
templates.risk: Color scale choices can exaggerate small changes.

templates.title: Density scatter
templates.task: Show dense x-y points.
templates.risk: Binning can create artificial clusters.

templates.title: Box plot with jitter
templates.task: Compare distributions and observations.
templates.risk: Small samples need visible points.

templates.title: Violin plot
templates.task: Compare distribution shapes.
templates.risk: Kernel smoothing can imply unsupported detail.

templates.title: Small multiples
templates.task: Repeat comparable panels.
templates.risk: Panels need shared scales to compare fairly.

templates.title: Category small multiples
templates.task: Compare the same categories across several panels.
templates.risk: Panel comparisons need the same category order and y-axis scale.

templates.title: Correlation matrix
templates.task: Summarize pairwise correlations.
templates.risk: Correlation signs need domain interpretation.

templates.title: Lollipop ranking
templates.task: Rank ordered items without heavy bars.
templates.risk: Rankings need uncertainty or sample-size context when values are close.

templates.title: Paired before/after
templates.task: Show paired change between two conditions.
templates.risk: The paired design must be real; do not connect unrelated groups.

templates.title: Spectral density
templates.task: Show frequency content in a sampled signal.
templates.risk: Sampling rate, windowing, and units must be stated.

templates.title: Residual convergence
templates.task: Show iterative residual decay.
templates.risk: Log scales can hide plateaus or stopping-rule problems.

templates.title: Main plot with inset
templates.task: Show a main trend with a magnified local region.
templates.risk: Insets can overemphasize small local features.

templates.title: Shared colorbar panels
templates.task: Compare several heatmaps on one color scale.
templates.risk: A shared scale can hide subtle within-panel variation.

templates.title: Gantt timeline
templates.task: Show tasks on a simple calendar timeline.
templates.risk: Timelines can imply false precision when dates are tentative.
